response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Recent role at re:cinq directly matches the stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AI agents, MCP tooling) and demonstrates polyglot adaptability. Solid background in testing, TDD, and craftsmanship aligns with code quality expectations. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and a current career gap, but the foundational skills transfer cleanly.
strengths: Direct recent experience with TypeScript/Node.js and AI agent/MCP infrastructure at re:cinq
Polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, PHP) with strong testing/TDD discipline
13+ years across web, backend, mobile, and DevOps with cloud/Docker/Kubernetes exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
No Kotlin experience; Java work is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Current career gap (caregiving) since October 2025 may affect immediate availability

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack experience and craftsmanship/testing focus
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience
